description_long: This object is a modern revolver-style handgun featuring a robust metal frame with a matte black finish and a prominent, vented barrel shroud. The grip is crafted from wood, ergonomically contoured with a smooth surface and visible grain, providing both comfort and style. The revolver has a large, rounded trigger guard and a visible cylinder for ammunition, with mechanical details such as a hammer and cylinder release. The top of the barrel is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of optics or accessories. The muzzle is wide and the front sight is raised, enhancing aiming precision. Subtle engravings and mechanical features are visible on the frame, contributing to its realistic and functional appearance.
description: A modern revolver handgun with a matte black metal frame, vented barrel shroud, and ergonomic wooden grip. Features include a Picatinny rail, visible cylinder, and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the revolver, including the vented barrel shroud, wooden grip, and detailed cylinder.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden grip's contour and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cylinder release, hammer, and additional frame engravings.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle opening, barrel shroud, and front sight alignment.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is made of polished wood with a rich brown hue, featuring a smooth, contoured surface that fits comfortably in the hand. It has subtle finger grooves for ergonomic support and a gentle palm swell, enhancing control and comfort. The wood grain is visible, adding a natural aesthetic, and there are no visible logos or embellishments. The base of the grip is rounded and slightly flared, providing a secure hold.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large and rounded, constructed from thick metal for durability. It features a smooth, matte finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement. The guard is generously sized to accommodate gloved fingers and has a slight undercut at the rear for improved grip access. Its design is functional and robust, lacking decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and encased in a vented shroud, giving it a tactical appearance. The shroud features multiple slots for heat dissipation and a full-length Picatinny rail on top for accessory mounting. The muzzle is wide and unthreaded, with a prominent front sight. The exterior finish is matte black, matching the rest of the frame.
attribute_slide_markings: Visible markings include a small circular logo on the frame near the cylinder and subtle mechanical engravings around the cylinder release and hammer. There are no prominent manufacturer names, serial numbers, or caliber designations visible on the barrel or slide area. The markings are minimal and understated.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not feature a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The base of the grip is rounded and smooth, with a slight flare for ergonomic support, and lacks any finger rests, logos, or texturing.
